changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.forcedNotice: You must choose a new password before continuing.
changePassword.mismatch: The new password and confirmation do not match.
changePassword.policyHint: At least 12 characters, including one non-letter.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Send a single-turn message to the configured LLM.
chat.placeholder: Type your message and press Enter to send. Use Shift+Enter for a new line.
chat.modelPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the configured default

field.initialPasswordHint: Leave blank and the server will generate one and show it once.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.body: Set a new password for {{name}}. The user must change it on next login.
resetPassword.newPasswordHint: Leave blank and the server will generate one and show it once.
resetPassword.warning: This password is shown only once. Copy it now — it cannot be retrieved later.
resetPassword.copyHint: Copy the generated password and share it with the user via a secure channel.

delete.title: Delete user
delete.body: Delete {{name}}? This is a soft delete and removes their active sessions.

field.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only.

delete.title: Delete group
delete.body: Delete the group "{{name}}"? Members are not deleted, only their membership in this group.

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Please try again.

chat.upstream: The LLM provider returned an error. Please try again.
chat.badRequest: The message could not be sent. Please check the input and try again.
chat.empty: Please enter a message before sending.

auth.mustChangePassword: You must change your password before continuing.
auth.weakPassword: Password must be at least 12 characters and include a non-letter.
auth.badRequest: The request could not be processed. Please check the input and try again.

admin.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
admin.groupSlugTaken: A group with this slug already exists.
admin.groupCycle: This change would create a circular group membership.
admin.groupSelfMember: A group cannot be a member of itself.
admin.missingMemberKind: Specify whether you are adding a user or a sub-group.
admin.userUsernameTaken: A user with this username already exists.
admin.userUnknownGroup: One or more group ids do not exist.
admin.userInvalidUsername: Username must be 3–32 characters using letters, digits, dot, underscore, or hyphen.
admin.lastAdmin: This change would remove the last administrator.
admin.cannotResetOwnPassword: Administrators must change their own password via the account menu, not the admin reset endpoint.
admin.notSeeded: Admin features are not available yet — the initial admin seed has not run.
admin.badRequest: The request could not be processed. Please check the input and try again.
